name: lueckenfinder
description: Find gaps between official open city data and OpenStreetMap, then fix them manually.

scripts.lint: biome lint --error-on-warnings src scripts tests .vscode index.html package.json tsconfig.json vite.config.ts biome.json
scripts.lint:fix: biome lint --write src scripts tests .vscode index.html package.json tsconfig.json vite.config.ts biome.json
scripts.format: biome format --write src scripts tests .vscode index.html package.json tsconfig.json vite.config.ts biome.json
scripts.format:check: biome format src scripts tests .vscode index.html package.json tsconfig.json vite.config.ts biome.json
scripts.quality: biome check --error-on-warnings src scripts tests .vscode index.html package.json tsconfig.json vite.config.ts biome.json
scripts.quality:fix: biome check --write src scripts tests .vscode index.html package.json tsconfig.json vite.config.ts biome.json
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm run quality && npm test
scripts.check: npm run verify && npm run build
